_doc.schema: Each object in 'tasks' is one study task. Fields:
_doc.id: Unique string identifier (e.g. 'T5'). Used in log events.
_doc.description: Question text shown to the participant.
_doc.colorKeywords: Optional. Array of { word, color } objects. Each occurrence of 'word' in description is wrapped in a coloured <span>.
_doc.options: Required for multiple-choice only. Array of option strings.
_doc.correctAnswer: String that must match selectedAnswer exactly to count as correct.
_doc.diagram: Path to the dataset JSON (currently always 'data/sampled_data.json').
_doc.howToAdd: Append a new object to the 'tasks' array. Tasks run in array order. The progress bar adjusts automatically. If the new task uses a different condition than the previous one, the canvas rebuilds automatically.

tasks.description: Which country of origin has the most airline routes in this network?
Find the busiest airport hub — the one where routes from the most countries converge. Look for the node where the greatest variety of edge colors and dash patterns meets.
Find the airport connected by the longest route in this network. Look for the thickest and most intensely colored edge, then identify the airport at one of its ends.
Which airport is the departure point for the most outgoing flights? Edges taper from wide at the source to narrow at the destination, and shift from green (source) to blue (target).
